scope_summary.problem: requirements.md: modules lack __all__ support for controlling star import exports (GitHub #975)
scope_summary.success_criteria: from X import * respects __all__ when defined; falls back to all non-underscore names when __all__ is absent

out_of_scope: __all__ type validation (not checking it is a list of strings)
constraints: Must not break existing from X import Y, Z behavior
Must work for both native and file-based modules
